userPromptSubmit.command: sh -c '[ -f .cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh cursor user-prompt-submit || bash "$HOME/.cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" cursor user-prompt-submit'

preToolUse.command: sh -c '[ -f .cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh cursor pre-tool-use || bash "$HOME/.cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" cursor pre-tool-use'

postToolUse.command: sh -c '[ -f .cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh cursor post-tool-use || bash "$HOME/.cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" cursor post-tool-use'

stop.command: sh -c '[ -f .cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh cursor stop || bash "$HOME/.cursor/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" cursor stop'
